title: Hotter than water
description: Welcome to a world of steam, gears, and endless mechanical possibilities!
body: Enter a world of steam, gears, and endless mechanical possibilities. Built around the Create mod, this modpack transforms Minecraft into a living factory where motion is power and creativity drives progress. Design intricate contraptions, automate complex production chains, and watch belts, cogs, and pistons work in harmony. From simple hand-cranked machines to sprawling, fully automated factories, every system you build feels mechanical, immersive, and deeply satisfying. Yet i still don't understand it.
